ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company operates in */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company's business */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "metro_area" TEXT /* Metro area where the company is located */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Funding status (e.g., Series A, Series B) */,
  "ipo_status" TEXT /* IPO status (e.g., public, private) */,
  "yearly_employees_growth" REAL /* Yearly growth rate of employees */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry */,
  "industry_size" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the industry */,
  "average_company_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue of companies in the industry */,
  "average_company_growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "metro_area" TEXT /* Metro area where the company is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the city or metro area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company relationship */,
  "company_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first company in the relationship */,
  "company_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second company in the relationship */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., partnership, collaboration) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_relations_company_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_1") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_relations_company_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("company_id_2") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., revenue, growth rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company profile being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the company profile */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the company profile */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the company profile */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_versions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the contact within the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contact was last updated */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user recommends the company */,
  "usefulness" INTEGER /* Usefulness rating of the review (1-5) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
